title: AddonService

selection.description: This field indicates whether the add-on service must be selected for the item. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

serviceFee.description: The amount charged for the add-on service.

serviceId.description: The ID number of the add-on service.

serviceType.description: The type of add-on service, such as AUTHENTICITY_GUARANTEE. For implementation help, refer to eBay API documentation

description: This container describes an add-on service that may be selected for an item or that may apply automatically. A charge may be associated with the add-on service.
